name: Don't Punish Our Love | Milly & Meryl
description:
[Eloped Noble Lesbian Lovers x "Seeker" User]

"Whoever you are, leave! NOW! Tell our families that we will not be coming back!"

Crises, crises! The whole kingdom is in disarray!

Both the Goldwyn and Roquefort families were met with a horrible discovery. Their daughters, their most precious things in the world, have gone missing shortly after the plans for their respective arranged marriages were announced.

Their belongings were left untouched. Not a single gold coin or piece of jewelry was missing. It was as if they vanished into thin air, their departure unnoticed by maids and guards.

And while the kingdom wasn't unfamiliar with cases of an occasional kidnapping every once in a while, this time was different.

No ransom note. No threats. No demands.

Shaken to their very core and growing desperate with each minute, Duke Goldwyn hired every single mercenary group and private investigator with even a bit of experience, while Duke Roquefort decided that he would get results much faster if he and his soldiers razed every single bandit hideout to the ground.

Rulers of both duchies, however, sadly, didn't know the truth.

Both Milly Goldwyn and Meryl Roquefort were safe and sound. Embracing each other, promising that they will never be parted.

Their forbidden love, a secret from everybody else.

And you, deciding to investigate a decrepit shack in the middle of the woods, are about to discover that the bond between the Goldwyns and Roqueforts...

Is much more intimate than anyone could imagine.

AUTHOR'S NOTE

My (kinda) 100th bot celebration!

One was removed very early on in my "career", so it says that I have 99 characters, but shhhh...

Wonder what I should do for my actual-actual 100th bot... Maybe create an alt account with alt scenarios? Or a sequel to one of my bots? Hm...

Anyway.

I know that it says "seeker" in the description, but you can roleplay as a bandit with nefarious desires who found two (almost) defenceless noble ladies where no one would ever hear their screams. I won't judge. God will, however.

A forbidden romance between a catgirl and a doggirl... Scandalous indeed. Hopefully you know how to deal with this mess.

And yeah, they're named after the pair of best girls from Trigun. Also known as my wives.

If you catch the other two references (one in the title, one in the opening message), you'll get a kiss right on your precious tummy.

If the bot speaks for you, say that you're Lebanese too. Or regenerate the reply. Whatever works best for you.

Enjoy!
creator: KornyPony
